name: Sean Patton
bio: Sean Patton is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and storyteller from New Orleans, known for a kinetic, high-energy style that blends physical comedy with intricate storytelling. A frequent late-night and festival performer, his debut hour Number One, filmed at Tipitina's in New Orleans, draws on his family, his obsessive-compulsive disorder, and his upbringing.

timeline.ev: Appears at Montreal's Just for Laughs New Faces showcase
Recurring profile as a New York club and late-night comic
Debut hour special Number One streams on Peacock

accolades: Number One: debut hour filmed at Tipitina's in New Orleans
